headline: Will Jack Henry’s (JKHY) Expanded Role in Zelle MDI Access and New Credit Facility Change Its Narrative?
summary: In late March 2026, the Zelle Network announced the second year of its Minority Depository Institution access program, expanding it through a new partnership with Jack Henry alongside Velera to help more community banks and credit unions offer Zelle, while Jack Henry also entered a new US$1.00 billion five-year revolving unsecured credit facility and won new core and digital banking mandates from Independent Bancshares’ FM BANK and Quoin Financial Bank. Together, these developments highlight...
